title: Rocket Colors
description: A texture pack that displays unique colors for each type of firework rocket duration.
body:
> ## About
> A texture pack that displays unique colors for each type of rocket duration.
> - **Duration 1** ~ Blue
> - **Duration 2** ~ Purple
> - **Duration 3** ~ Red

> ## Why
> This texture pack simplifies inventory management and crafting by using different colors to clearly display rocket mixes, making it easy to identify what you have at a glance. 

>  ## Image
> ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5776eb4eff2cc82f38e0e4c325fc0604abd9461.png)

> ## Contact
> To share suggestions or ideas for this texture pack or others, contact me on Discord: @999otp.
